history.note: Source-inspected malloc/free debug logging compile-time switch; verified compile-guard edges from _n_ptoa32, NoteMalloc, and NoteFree; no focused enabled-logging test found.
Completed NOTE_C_SHOW_MALLOC compile-time logging slice.
Verified absent/unclassifiable JSON type code from note.h and n_cjson_helpers.c JGetType/JGetItemType; focused JGetType tests cover missing, null-item, and invalid cases.
Verified true JSON classification from note.h and JGetItemType, with JBaseItemType bool coalescing; focused tests cover true and base-type behavior.
Verified false JSON classification and omit-empty checks in object printing; focused tests cover false and bool base-type behavior.
Verified alias to JTYPE_BOOL_TRUE and base bool code returned by JBaseItemType; focused base-type tests cover bool coalescing and passthrough.
Verified null JSON classification from JGetItemType; focused JGetType and print behavior tests cover null classification behavior.
Verified zero-number detailed code and omit-empty checks; focused tests cover zero-number classification and base number coalescing.
Verified nonzero/base numeric classification through JGetItemType and JBaseItemType; focused tests cover numeric and base-type behavior.
Verified blank-string detailed code and omit-empty checks; focused tests cover blank-string classification and base string coalescing.
Verified numeric zero string classification through JAtoN branch and JBaseItemType; focused tests cover string-zero and base string behavior.
Verified nonzero numeric string classification through JAtoN branch and JBaseItemType; focused tests cover numeric-string and base string behavior.
Verified case-insensitive true-string classification and base string coalescing; focused tests cover string-bool-true behavior.
Verified case-insensitive false-string classification and base string coalescing; focused tests cover string-bool-false behavior.
Verified ordinary/base string classification through JGetItemType and JBaseItemType; focused tests cover string and base string behavior.
Verified object classification from JGetItemType; focused tests cover object classification and base-type passthrough.
Verified array classification from JGetItemType; focused tests cover array classification and base-type passthrough.
